PATIENT_ID: TEST_CLABSI_CHRONIC_001
ARRIVAL_TIME: 2026-01-15 08:00:00

[PHYSICIAN_NOTE] 2026-01-15 10:00:00
Patient with chronic dialysis catheter, tunneled.
HD catheter prior to admission.
Long-term central venous catheter in place.

[LAB] 2026-01-18 08:00:00
Blood culture positive for Enterococcus.

[NURSING_NOTE] 2026-01-18 12:00:00
Patient febrile, temperature 38.8 C.
Chills noted.
Suspected central line-associated bloodstream infection.
New onset fever on day 3.
